entry.title: Re: How can we customize/override DateAdapter of de.hybri...
entry.content:
Hi,

I can see that you tried to follow the steps described on Help page: Custom Configuration of the HTTP Message Converters. However from the screenshot I can see that you still used the OOTB DateAdapter. Have you tried implementing your own adapter and adding it to the list instead of the OOTB one? Keep in mind that this change will affect only the webservice available in your custom extension. If you wish to implement this change globally you would need to use a mechanism to change OOTB files. A simple way to achieve that is to use buildcallbacks in your custom extension and use ant to replace the OOTB list of adapters with the custom one. You can check an example how to do it in this answer. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Retrieve App Name in API Management by using Policies
entry.content:
1. Background

Once an API has been exposed via the API Management, technically it can be consumed by any applications. Sometimes we have requirement to know who is the caller. One of the solutions is to ask the application put the client id into HTTP header as the X-App-Key, which can be used to determine the application name later. Another soluton is even more straightforward, that just let the applicaiton fill up 'Sender System Name' into the HTTP header as a property like 'SenderService'. However, both of the solutions have a disadvantage, that the application needs an extra step, which might be refused or forgetted.  

Actually, the OAuth Token generated by API Management does content the application information. The above steps with X-App-Key or 'SenderService' are a sort of redundant. Here is the analysis on how to get the application name from the OAuth Token, which is compulsory from the API consumers.

2. Analysis

Turn an API proxy into the debug mode and consume it. Check the policy 'VerifyOAuthToken'. We can see the variable 'developer.app.name' has been set by the framework, as below.

Now let's consume BTP API by using the developer.app.name

This is part of the response:

As a comparison, This is how the application has been registered in the 'API Business Hub Enterprise'.

Once the titile, short text or description information has got, it is not hard to tell the iflow or backend what is the sender system. 

From the high level design's perspective, we can come up with at least two kinds of solutions on it.

  • Solution 1. Set the 'developer.app.name' into HTTP header, and pass it to the CPI iflow.  Then get the application information in the CPI layer.
  • Solution 2. Get the application information in the API management layer by means of policy.

Solution 1 is easier to fulfill and easier to monitor, While solution 2 is more elegant and better modularization.

Solution 2 will be introduct in the below chapters.

3. Prerequisite

This is not a building from scratch tutorial. There are few prerequisites of the configuration which will not be introduced in details here. They have been listed here for the convenience of the new starters.

3.1 OAuth2 Token API

The OAuth2 token API is not mandatory option for API management authentication. whereas it is the chosen one for below tutorial. You can choose other types as well. Please refer to this blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/oauth-2-0-authentication-for-api-management-to-connect-to-cpi/ba-p/13504672 for how to configure OAuth2 token API. 

3.2 Credential of CI

In order to check the effect of the process, an iflow will be wrapped up by the API proxy. Therefore the CI credential is needed to consume the iflow. Please refer here to get or generate service key for CI iflow: https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/creating-service-instance-and-service-key-for-inbound-authentication . make sure the plan is integration-flow

3.3 Create an iflow

The iflow is used to check the effect of the process. just try to make it as simple as possible. you may create your own. Here is mine and you can download it from https://github.com/stephenxue/GetAppName.git 

Make sure the HTTP Header property 'SenderService' is allowed to the iflow

The logic of the iflow is just to read SenderService from HTTP header and put it into the response message as below

4. API Manegment Configuration

4.1 Prepare for credential and URLs

Firstly, please get the CI credential and iflow URL.

Secondly, for consuming BTP Application API, we need a service key for service 'API Management, API portal' and plan 'apiportal-apiaccess'. 

please store the service key. we will use it later. It should look like this

 

{
    "url": "https://ap10apiportal.cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "clientId": "sb-apiaccess_1721265820743!b9999|api-portal-xsuaa!b160",
    "clientSecret": "73e9ea2d-5213-4e9e-8ccd-fb2ff4d6b0fc$tM3NaIK6owFXqWE3mcdmaokp5pwMfM9hTAOzItuMeslg=",
    "tokenUrl": "https://<client>-8x5whtls.authentication.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token"
}

 

 

 

Thirdly, form the application API URL.

The format of the URL is:

 

https://<url of the above service key>/apiportal/api/1.0/Management.svc/Applications

 

please keep it.

4.2 Maintain Key Value Maps

Altogether 3 KVMs are to be created. 

4.2.1 For storing CI credential

It is better to be an encrpted KVM

4.2.2 For storing Credential for generating API Token

it is better to be an encrypted KVM. fill up the clientId and clientSecret from above chapter

4.2.3 For Storing URLs

Please create it as an un-encrypted KVM. Please fill up the Application API path into URL_API_Application and fill up tokenUrl into URL_API_Token as below

4.3 API Manegement Policy Configuration

The process consists of 11 policies, with 9 of them in the Proxy Endpoint and 2 of them in the Target Endpoint

The whole policies are put into a policy template which can be downloaded from https://github.com/stephenxue/GetAppName.git 

This is the detail configuration information per policy.

4.3.1 Policy OAuthV2

This policy is used to verify OAuth2 token from the consumer request.

 

<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
   <!-- By default, VerifyAccessToken expects the access token to be sent in an Authorization header. You can change that default using this element<AccessToken> -->
   <!-- If you want to pass access token in an customer header "access_token": -->
   <!-- <AccessToken>request.header.access_token</AccessToken> -->
   <!-- If you want to pass access token in query param "access_token": -->
   <!-- <AccessToken>request.queryparam.access_token</AccessToken> -->
   <!-- this flag has to be set when you want to work with third-party access tokens -->
   <ExternalAuthorization>false</ExternalAuthorization>
   <!-- valid values are GenerateAccessToken, GenerateAccessTokenImplicitGrant, GenerateAuthorizationCode ,
    RefreshAccessToken , VerifyAccessToken , InvalidateToken , ValidateToken  -->
   <Operation>VerifyAccessToken</Operation>
   <GenerateResponse enabled="true"/><SupportedGrantTypes/>
   <Tokens/>
</OAuthV2>

 

It sets the variable 'developer.app.name' automatically with the application ID.

4.3.2 Policy LookupCache

This is the step reading stored API Token from cache.

 

<!-- configures how cached values should be retrieved at runtime -->
<LookupCache async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<!-- configures a unique pointer to a piece of data stored in the cache -->
	<CacheKey>
		<KeyFragment>APIM_Token</KeyFragment>
	</CacheKey>
	<Scope>Global</Scope>
	<!-- the variable to which the cache entry should be assigned after it is looked up -->
	<AssignTo>external_access_token</AssignTo>
</LookupCache>

 

  • if it is successful, it will assign the variable 'external_access_token' and set variable 'lookupcache.ReadTokenForAPIFromCache.cachehit' to true;
  • if it is not successful, it will set variable 'lookupcache.ReadTokenForAPIFromCache.cachehit' to false;
4.3.3 Policy KeyValueMapOperations The First

This step reads URLs which might be used later, including the Application API Path and the API token URL

 

<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="APIM_AppName" async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- PUT stores the key value pair mentioned inside the element -->
   <Get assignTo="URL_API_Token" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>URL_API_Token</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
   <Get assignTo="URL_API_Application" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>URL_API_Application</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
	<!-- the scope of the key value map. Valid values are environment, organization, apiproxy and policy -->
	<Scope>environment</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

 

4.3.4 Policies Renew the API Token

If the token retrieving step failed, it means the token has expired and needs to be renewed. All of the policies in this chapter should have a condition string below for a better performance.

 

lookupcache.ReadTokenForAPIFromCache.cachehit = false

 

4.3.4.1 Policy KeyValueMapOperations The Second

This step reads credential used for generating API Token.

 

<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="APIM_Credential" async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- PUT stores the key value pair mentioned inside the element -->
   <Get assignTo="private.client_id" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>client_id</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
   <Get assignTo="private.client_secret" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>client_secret</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
	<!-- the scope of the key value map. Valid values are environment, organization, apiproxy and policy -->
	<Scope>environment</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

 

4.3.4.2 Policy ServiceCallout The First

This step makes a call to the Token API to retriev the token for the BTP Application API

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ServiceCallout async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <Request>
        <Set>
            <Headers>
                <Header name="Content-Type">application/x-www-form-urlencoded</Header>
            </Headers>
            <FormParams>
                <FormParam name="client_id">{private.client_id}</FormParam>
                <FormParam name="client_secret">{private.client_secret}</FormParam>
                <FormParam name="grant_type">client_credentials</FormParam>
            </FormParams>
            <Verb>POST</Verb>
        </Set>
    </Request>
    <Response>TokenResponse</Response>
    <Timeout>30000</Timeout>
    <HTTPTargetConnection>
        <URL>https://{URL_API_Token}</URL>
    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

 

4.3.4.3 Policy ExtractVariables The First

This step derives response json message from the above step and retrieve the access token. At the same time, it derives token expiry time in second. 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <JSONPayload>
        <Variable name="external_access_token" type="string">
            <JSONPath>$.access_token</JSONPath>
        </Variable>
        <Variable name="expires_in" type="integer">
            <JSONPath>$.expires_in</JSONPath>
        </Variable>        
    </JSONPayload>
    <Source>TokenResponse</Source>
</ExtractVariables>

 

4.3.4.4 Policy PopulateCache

This step updates the API token into cache so that it can be reuse in future.

 

<!-- configures how cached values should be written at runtime -->
<PopulateCache async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<!-- configures a unique pointer to a piece of data stored in the cache -->
	<CacheKey>
		<KeyFragment>APIM_Token</KeyFragment>
	</CacheKey>
	<!-- specifies the cache where the data is to be stored -->
	<Scope>Global</Scope>
	<ExpirySettings>
		<!-- the number of seconds after which a cache entry should expire -->
		<TimeoutInSeconds ref="expires_in"/>
	</ExpirySettings>
	<!-- specifies the variable whose value should be written into cache -->
	<Source>external_access_token</Source>
</PopulateCache>

 

Until this stage, the token has been renewed and stored in the cache.

4.3.5 Policy ServiceCallout The Second

This step makes a call to BTP Application API and get the app name in the response. This is the main step of the process. 

 

<!-- this policy lets you call to an external service from your API flow -->
<ServiceCallout async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- The request that gets sent from the API proxy flow to the external service -->
	<Request>
	    <Set>
	        <Headers>
	            <Header name="Authorization">Bearer {external_access_token}</Header>
	        </Headers>
	    </Set>
	</Request>    
	<!-- the variable into which the response from the external service should be stored -->
	<Response>sapapim.tokenresponse</Response>
	<!-- The time in milliseconds that the Service Callout policy will wait for a response from the target before exiting. Default value is 120000 ms -->
	<Timeout>30000</Timeout>
	<HTTPTargetConnection>
		<!-- The URL to the service being called -->
		<URL>https://{URL_API_Application}('{developer.app.name}')?$select=title</URL>
      <!-- The SSL reference to be used to access the https url -->
	</HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

 

4.3.6 Policy ExtractVariables The Second

This step derives response from above step and get the title field which is the application name. Set it to the HTTP header as the property SenderService

 

<!-- Extract content from the request or response messages, including headers, URI paths, JSON/XML payloads, form parameters, and query parameters -->
<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
    <!-- the source variable which should be parsed -->
    <Source>sapapim.tokenresponse</Source>
    <!-- Specifies the XML-formatted message from which the value of the variable will be extracted -->
    <XMLPayload>
        <Namespaces>
            <Namespace prefix="a">http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom</Namespace>
            <Namespace prefix="m">http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata</Namespace>
            <Namespace prefix="d">http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices</Namespace>
        </Namespaces>
        <!-- Specifies variable to which the extracted value will be assigned -->
        <Variable name="request.header.SenderService" type="string">
            <!-- Specifies the XPath defined for the variable -->
            <XPath>/a:entry/a:content/m:properties/d:title</XPath>
        </Variable>
    </XMLPayload>
</ExtractVariables>

 

All 9 policies above are placed in the Proxy Endpoint flow. The two policies below are placed in the Target Endpoint flow. 

4.3.7 Policy KeyValueMapOperations The Third

This step reads credential for CI layer

 

<!-- Key/value pairs can be stored, retrieved, and deleted from named existing maps by configuring this policy by specifying PUT, GET, or DELETE operations -->
<!-- mapIdentifier refers to the name of the key value map -->
<!-- Don't use Key Value Maps to store your logs as this can impact API Proxy runtime flow -->
<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="SCI_iFlow" async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- PUT stores the key value pair mentioned inside the element -->
   <Get assignTo="private.username" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>username</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
   <Get assignTo="private.password" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>password</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
	<!-- the scope of the key value map. Valid values are environment, organization, apiproxy and policy -->
	<Scope>environment</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

 

4.3.8 Policy BasicAuthentication

This step sets the base64 string of the credential for consuming the iFlow

 

<BasicAuthentication async='true' continueOnError='false' enabled='true' xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
 	<!-- Operation can be Encode or Decode -->
   <Operation>Encode</Operation>
   <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>false</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
   <User ref="private.username" />
   <Password ref="private.password" />
   <AssignTo createNew="true">request.header.Authorization</AssignTo>
</BasicAuthentication>

 

Now all policies have been configured. Let's conduct the test for the result. 

5. Unit Test

Create an API proxy for the CI iFlow. Add the above policies to the proxy. Then add the API proxy together with a Token API proxy into a product, say S4_ERP. 

5.1 Test for App01

Register an application for the product called App01. Store the App Secret and App Key

Generate an OAuth2 token by using the above credential.

Now consuming the API Proxy by using the above access_token

We can see that the Application Name App01 has been determined.

5.2 Test for App02

Register an application for the product called App02. Store the App Secret and App Key

Generate an OAuth2 token by using the above credential.

now consume the API proxy by using the above access_token

The Application Name has been determined. If the debug mode has been switched on, we can see that the token renew flow has been bypassed, since the below variable is true.

6. Conclusion

By using the Application ID after the OAuthVerify policy and By consuming the BTP Application API, we can retireve the application name from the OAuth2 token. It is an option for you to implement the logic by means of policy configuration in the SAP API Management. This is the download link for all of the contents configured above. https://github.com/stephenxue/GetAppName.git please take your own risk to use it. 

 

Reference

For Policy Configuration https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-api-management-policies/ba-p/13529965

entry.title: SAP HANA Tenant DB tables connection with another Tenant
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a scenario where we are consuming the DB tables from one tenant to another in Calculation Views and Table Functions. Below is an example where the other Tenant (BD1) DB table is consumed.

When moving these CV's to quality, it should auto assign this to 'BQ1'. Can you please suggest, how this can be achieved?

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: Search string in EBS, part 3 - bank charges
entry.content:
Hi Bohdan,

 

nice post I came to view a couple of times in the last year.

 

I have one requirement now, where I am stuck.

We get a bank charge in the statement and would need to post that with VAT.

 

like:

posting 1:

bank outgoing   vs    bank account 10 

 

posting 2

    bank charge   9

    VAT                1

bank outgoing  10

 

Do you know how this could be realised?

 

 

Thanks in advance

Hein

entry.title: Re: Issue with Loading/Creating Story Reports in Non-Prod...
entry.content: Im also having the same issue, enabled third party cookies, cleared them etc etc and still no success.

entry.title: CodeJam CAP/AI in Vienna, Austria
entry.content:
We have a CodeJam scheduled with the SAP Inside Track in Vienna, Austria on March, the 20th 2025.

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/build-ai-services-using-the-sap-cloud-application-programming-model-and-sap/ev-p/14008974

There are still seats open, if you want to join me for a nice day coding and learning click the link above!

Can't wait to see you in Vienna!

entry.title: Re: Community Member Spotlight: Roberta Fernandes - February 2025 Edition
entry.content:
Congratulations @RobertaFernande. Please keep contributing to the SAP Community. 

Regards

Virinchy

entry.title: can u share your resolution on the error
Re: How can we customize/override DateAdapter of de.hybri...
entry.content: That screenshot is for reference only. But yes we tried to modify the list by adding our custom adapter (Updated screenshot in Post). But it didn't work, Can you please check once if anything missing? Else will try buildcallbacks.

entry.title: Re: cloud connector alerts not receiving via email
entry.content: Hi Ulrich_Schmidt, Issue has been resolved. Issue with SMTP server for few users. Thanks for the quick response

entry.title: Re: wcm issue
Re: wcm issue
entry.content: Sebastian, thank you. It works for me - config. item "Generate Basic Settings" (t-code WCC3).

entry.title: Re: Effective date when status is "Inactive" for a Depart...
entry.content:
Hi Kayla,

Thanks for your response but there is a challenge. Let's suppose for a department, couple of records exists as follows:

i) Effective Date 01.12.2024 and End Date 28.02.2025 (Active Only)
ii) Effective Date 01.03.2025 and End Date 31.12.9999 (Active Only, there are few changes in department hence new record inserted for department).

Using the mentioned logic, system considers 1st record only (Effective Date from 01.12.2024) to validate date and end date validation will fail because End Date is 28.02.2025. System does not consider next record (which is also active) end date i.e. 31.12.9999.
I tested it and system is considering end date of latest department record only. Please advise.

entry.title: 'Free' text from classroom trainings registration
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

When user is trying to register for a class they see a text as 'Free' as the pricing is not defined for this class.

Is there anyway to remove that text. Any lead here is appreciated.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Screenshot to add validation
entry.content:
need to know the path from where you have put validation with screen shot, I also have same requirement but amount limit is 10k.

I have put the validation in OB28 but didnt get the expected result can anybody give step by step screenshot.

Pre-requisites:

SYST-TCODE = 'FBCJ' AND ( BKPF-BUKRS = '1020' AND BSEG-HKONT = '606901' )

Check:

BSEG-WRBTR <= '20000.00'

Message:

Error: Amounts exceeds 20000

BSEG-SHKZG = 'H' by Ramana BommannagariRamana BommannagariYesterday 4:36 PM

BSEG-SHKZG = 'H'

entry.title: Item category L in RFQ doc category R
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I have created a subcontracting PR and created a RFQ (Doc category R) however Item category is not copied to RFQ (EKPO-PSTYP= 0). When I am checking the RFQ in Manage RFQ app item category field is not appearing. Can you please help with the issue.

 

    

 

Regards,

Aniket.

entry.title: Re: sap gui gesperrt nach mehreren Fehlversuchen sich anzumelden
entry.content:
Hallo,

reden wir eigentlich noch über die Developer-Ausgabe? Die ist prinzipiell vorrangig für ABAP-Entwickler interessant, daher wundert mich die Frage. Oder besteht das Problem auf einem anderen System? 

Wie auch immer, Anlage eines ABAP-Reports in Kurzform: mit einem User mit den entsprechenden Berechtigungen (in der Developer-Ausgabe sind das die User DEVELOPER und BWDEVELOPER) in einem Mandanten anmelden, der für Programmentwicklung offen ist (Einstellungen in SCC4 und SE03), Transaktion SE80 oder SE38 oder Eclipse verwenden und dort ein ABAP-Programm anlegen. Attribute ausfüllen, Transportauftrag verwenden/erstellen oder lokale Entwicklungsklasse verwenden, Source-Code einfügen, sichern, aktivieren. 

Viele Grüße

Jan

entry.title: Issue with Enter Event in Fiori GUI Apps (MIGO, MM03)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are facing an issue in Fiori with the GUI apps MIGO, MM03

When entering a material number in the selection screen (or in MIGO's material field) and pressing Enter, nothing happens. In the SAP GUI, this action triggers the Enter event, but when opening the same apps in Fiori, the event does not work.

The behavior is similar across different browsers.

When testing in incognito mode, the Enter event works in any of the apps—but only the first time. Within the same session, if we try the same action in a different app (or even reopen the same app a second time), the Enter event no longer works.

We have already cleared the browser cache, but this did not resolve the issue.

What could be causing this problem? Is there any way to prevent this behavior?

Thank you,
Veronika

entry.title: Re: s_alr_87012357
entry.content: Could you please verify the posting dates of the transactions that were not included in the VAT settlement? In most cases, the documents were posted on dates different from those used for the VAT settlement.

entry.title: Re: ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01-Error message: ‘Password login no longer possible - too many failed attempts
entry.content: As said in the blog post "ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now", please add the tag #abap_trial to the question to make it visible to SAP people.

entry.title: Re: Community Member Spotlight: Roberta Fernandes - February 2025 Edition
entry.content:
Congratulations, Roberta, on this inspiring interview!  It's amazing to see how your journey, from your first steps in 2017 to organizing major events, truly reflects the spirit of the SAP Community: collaboration, learning, and passion for knowledge.

Your dedication to mentoring new professionals and your willingness to share experiences highlight the positive impact you have on our community. I'm confident that you will be a fantastic SAP Mentor in the future!

entry.title: Re: Failed to subscribe Build Apps in BTP Trial
entry.content:
Hi @RebeccaYang  ,

I am facing the same error.  

SAP Build Process Automation worked fine.  But Build App did not work.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Salvador 2025
entry.content: Excelente oportunidade!!!

entry.title: Combining POs with different Purchase organizations in one inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I faced a problem with creation of inbound delivery. It should refer to few POs with different Purchasing organizations. Does anyone have such experience? I tried but the system returns an error "delivery split because the partners are different. Message no. VL014"
and then it splits the inbound delivery on the quantity of purch organizations.

Is this possible to switch off this option and combine all POs with different Purch orgs in one inb deliv?

I tried to look in SPRO but the only criteria for split there is warehouse. 

Will be very much obliged for any ideas,

Elena

entry.title: Hi all,I am new to SAP CRM Functional role,how to change the configuration on CIC screen for "Alerts
entry.content: Hi all, I am new to SAP CRM Functional role, Please help with how to change the configuration on CIC screen for "Alerts"

entry.title: Re: ⚡ Vamos realizar 1º SAP Meet-Up do ano de 2025!
entry.content: É incrível ver a comunidade SAP Fortaleza reunida para compartilhar experiências, fortalecer conexões e alinhar as ações para o tão aguardado SAP Inside Track Fortaleza 2025! Eventos como esse mostram a força da nossa comunidade, unindo aprendizado, networking e, claro, muita diversão!

entry.title: Procurement of Health Insurance premium for employees in S/4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a scenario involving the procurement of health insurance, where the purchase is based on a rate basis, with the rate varying according to the age bracket of the insured employee and their family members.

  • The health insurance agreement is structured on a Pro Rata basis, meaning the charges apply only for the covered period, rather than a fixed quantity or total value.
  • New Employee Addition: A new employee can be added to the existing health insurance agreement at any time during the year. The premium for the addition is calculated from the month of inclusion until the agreement's remaining validity period, rather than for a full year.
  • Employee Exit: If an employee leaves the organization during the agreement period, the premium charges will be deducted only for the months they were employed.
  • Premium rates vary based on the age brackets of the employee and their family members, necessitating a dynamic rate calculation mechanism.

Kindly provide us the most suitable approach to procure and map health insurance in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, considering the above factors. Kindly suggest an appropriate process and configuration to achieve this requirement effectively.

Thanks!

Regards,

Sabarinathan K

entry.title: Re: Relative ADT Link to a Method of a Class
entry.content:
Hi,

if you install ABAPGit, there comes a class (ZCL_ABAPGIT_ADT_LINK) and method (GENERATE), which exactly implements this pattern (Thomas mentioned).

 

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: SAC Advance Formula Error while copying data from one model to other model
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to copy data from one model A to another planning model B with MODEL and LINK command. With this I also want to populate dimensions of Model B using properties of Model A dimension. I am using following script but it gives me error of Scope redirection.

//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//Set Configurations Definitions for the Advanced Formulas.
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = FISCALYEAR
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = OFF
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//The data region against which the formulas will be executed.
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = ("MDP")
MEMBERSET [d/FISCAL_MONTH] = BASEMEMBER([d/FISCAL_MONTH].[h/FYP], %FISCAL_YEAR%)
MEMBERSET [d/DATA_SOURCE] = ("UPLOAD_PTA_SLS")
//MEMBERSET [d/ACCOUNT] = "CGRETSL"
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//Calculation and Data Writing
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Link PTA Actuals Model to transfer data
MODEL [SaFARI - PTA Actuals]
ENDMODEL
 
// Copy Data to Planning model and assign properties of Base Code to Estimate Code, Factory and Product to respective dimension
DATA(
    [d/Measures] = "MDP", 
[d/ESTIMATE_CODE] = [SaFARI - PTA Actuals].[d/BASECODE].[p/EST_CODE],
[d/FACTORY] = [SaFARI - PTA Actuals].[d/BASECODE].[p/FACTORY],
    [d/SaFARI_PRODUCT] = [SaFARI - PTA Actuals].[d/BASECODE].[p/PRODUCT]
 
) = LINK(
    [SaFARI - PTA Actuals],
    [d/Version] = "public.Actual",
    [d/Measures] = "MDP"
)
 
------
Below are the error messages I get with this code.
- There is violation of scope redirection in the calculation expressions.
- The dimension [SaFARI - PTA Actuals].BASECODE] is not allowed to be used with linked model because it is shared dimension.
 
Appreciate any help on this. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: can we set up workflow when an order/ quote goes on c...
entry.content:
Hi, you can try to add your own WF condition by using badi SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF. 

Check this: 
SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Flexible Workflow with new cus... - SAP Community

KR 
Veronika

entry.title: Error in downloading report -Purchase Register (Item+Service)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am writing to seek your assistance with an issue we are encountering when exporting data from SAP Business One to Excel through Copy Table and Export to Excel. We have observed the following problems:
Disorganized Data: When exporting data, it does not appear in an organized manner in Excel.

 

Missing Data: Occasionally, the exported data shows fewer entries compared to the original report in SAP Business One.

 

File Repair Issues:
When the file contains a larger amount of data, Excel displays an error message stating it was unable to open the file and attempts to repair it.

 

These issues are significantly impacting our ability to efficiently analyze and utilize the exported data. I would appreciate any guidance or solutions you could provide to resolve these problems.


Please find attached, the screenshot of the error.

 

 

Regards,

Gazanfar Ali Shaikh

entry.title: Re: How can we customize/override DateAdapter of de.hybri...
entry.content:
Assuming that you have an OCC extension (e.g., customocc) generated from the yocc template and requiring commercewebservices, you can define a custom DateAdapter by following these steps:

  • Create CustomDateAdapter that extends XmlAdapter<String, Date>
  • Implement the marshal() and unmarshal() methods
  • Add the following bean definition to resources/occ/v2/trainingocc/web/spring/customocc-web-spring.xml

 

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactory" />
    <property name="targetMethod" value="setTypeAdapters" />
    <property name="arguments">
        <list value-type="java.lang.Class">
            <value>your.package.customocc.jaxb.adapters.CustomDateAdapter</value>
            <value>de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters.StringMapAdapter</value>
            <value>de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters.XSSStringAdapter</value>
        </list>
    </property>
</bean>

 

  • Build the code with ant all command
  • Start server

I tried this on my local environment and successfully customized the output for Date attributes. The only drawback of this solution is that if SAP adds a new adapter to the customJaxbContextFactory bean, you will also need to add it to your bean definition.

To prevent this issue, we should remove DateAdapter from the list and add our CustomAdapter. However, I couldn't find an easy way to do this. I was able to achieve it using the following bean definitions, but it does not seem as simple and clear as the previous definition.

<bean id="customJaxbContextFactoryTypeAdaptersList" class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactory"/>
    <property name="targetMethod" value="getTypeAdapters"/>
</bean>

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactoryTypeAdaptersList"/>
    <property name="targetMethod" value="remove"/>
    <property name="arguments">
        <list value-type="java.lang.Class">
            <value>de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters.DateAdapter</value>
        </list>
    </property>
</bean>

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactoryTypeAdaptersList"/>
    <property name="targetMethod" value="add"/>
    <property name="arguments">
        <list value-type="java.lang.Class">
            <value>your.package.customocc.jaxb.adapters.CustomDateAdapter</value>
        </list>
    </property>
</bean>

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactory" />
    <property name="targetMethod" value="setTypeAdapters" />
    <property name="arguments">
        <list>
            <ref bean="customJaxbContextFactoryTypeAdaptersList"/>
        </list>
    </property>
</bean>

You can choose whichever approach you prefer—both work and are valid options.

entry.title: Re: SM58 tRFC errors with text: "SAP ArchiveLink: Obj. type not assigned to storage"
entry.content: Hi, I'm facing the same issue. Did you find a way to identify what was triggering the tRFC errors?

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Down Payment Process Integrating with FI-AR
entry.content:
Hi, @wanglip0 

How do you get the FAZ-class invoice document to determine the tax in the same way as the billing plan in your example?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Manager Form Eligibility Rules - Variable Pay Management
entry.content: Hi @xavierlegarrec, thank you very much for your feedback. This issue is resolved. The date did not cause the issue because it was set up as 01/01/2025. However, the issue was resolved by first applying eligibility before launching the worksheet. First launching the worksheet and afterwards applying eligibility + update worksheet did not work. Thank you very much again. Best regards, Ann-Kathrin

entry.title: Re: ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01-Error message: ‘Password login no longer possible - too many failed attempts
entry.content:
Hi !. 

Those are users and password comes registered on that system.

Try with that. Good luck

username	password	description
DDIC	        Appl1ance	Data Dictionary User
DEVELOPER	Appl1ance	Developer User
SAP*	        Appl1ance	SAP Administrator

Juan Rios

entry.title: Re: Where can I find free learning resources for ABAP Cloud back-end developers?
entry.content:
Hi @Timothy_Dev 
Thank you for your engagement and posting this very important question.
I would like to encourage rather than posting a question to a blog to used our SAP Learning Q&A section  and post your question there.
This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses
Would you mind to repost it ?
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Security Vulnerabilities in Crystal report engine for...
entry.content: Thank you for confirming they were fixed

entry.title: Re: An error occurred while operating a TECO production order using T-Code CO02 or COHV
entry.content: There are old notes suggesting a problem with a configuration instance, so you'll want to see if you can find any problems there or otherwise open a message with SAP.  KBA 1571987 mentions a different scenario but it's possible the problem could be similar to what you are facing here.

entry.title: What is the SAP recommended user input to use for large number of entries?
entry.content:
We are currently implementing a cap application with the flexible programming model. In the background we a huge number of importers which need to be selected by the user. 

I have read into the guidelines from SAP and found out that the SELECT input field should be used for up to 12 entries, the COMBOBOX for up to 200 entries and for larger numbers of entries one should use an input with suggestions. 

Since we have more than 50000 entries I decided to use an input field with suggestions and I am filtering the results by myself. This worked fine so far, however the bad thing about the input field is that the user does not have to necessarly select an item since the input field does also accept free text. 

Therefore I looked again in the documentation and found the flag valueHelpOnly. However this flag is deprecated without any replacement and does not work in code. In the documentation it says that one should use combobox or select which goes against the guidelines which I listed above. 

Therefore I wanted to know what the recommendation from SAP side is for a select of a huge number of data, where the user should not be able to leave free text? Or if this needs to be implemented by each developer himself

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer inside UpdatePanel displays onl...
entry.content:
Have a look at this KBA on using sessions and postback:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/1985571

See if that works for you

entry.title: Re: Upload of a custom logo to be displayed in an SAP Fiori launchpad shell
entry.content: Thanks for posting and a kind request to mention the how-to also in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023.

entry.title: Deliver AI value across your business with DataRobot Insight Apps for SAP
entry.content:
At DataRobot, we’ve worked with hundreds of clients across industries and one thing remains crystal clear: delivering AI to where users need it, and where they’ll actually use it, is still a challenge. As organizations work to fit AI into their business processes, they’re still running into the same big hurdles. 

Organizations struggle with unifying data and getting it AI-ready, and they struggle with building AI solutions that solve pressing business problems, and delivering those solutions to users in time to make a real impact. Instead of focusing on what needs to be delivered, they get bogged down with making data accessible, creating the infrastructure for AI deployment, and designing solutions.

With the launch of SAP Business Data Cloud, and the AI-powered Insight Apps for SAP from DataRobot, it’s never been easier to move past infrastructure constraints, and focus on delivering real business value from AI. 

This joint solution provides the fastest way to unify data access, operationalize AI, and deliver AI where it’s needed – transforming how organizations work with AI.

Enhancing SAP Business Data Cloud with Insight Apps 

SAP Business Data Cloud unifies data and analytics with companies’ business processes, empowering leaders with complete context for faster decision making and better business planning. This serves as a trusted data foundation, delivering seamless access to reliable, business-ready data and empowering organizations to prepare data for AI and drive innovation with confidence. 

To help organizations leverage this unified data and rapidly deliver relevant and impactful AI solutions, DataRobot is launching AI-powered Insight Apps for Business Data Cloud. 

These new application suites combine deep industry domain experience and best practices with pre-built and customizable solutions that accelerate use cases for planning, enterprise analytics, advanced analytical apps, and predictive forecasting. 

This enables SAP customers to prioritize business needs and deliver solutions built with trusted methods, and end-to-end observability and oversight. 

DataRobot Insight Apps provide the fastest way to confidently develop and deliver critical AI use cases directly where they’re needed.

Each DataRobot Insight App comes complete with the key components to tackle critical use cases:

  • Multiple specialized, pre-built and customizable solutions tailored to specific industry vertical or horizontal use cases such as cash flow forecasting or inventory management
  • One-click integrations with data sources like Business Data Cloud and others, reducing the effort needed to connect systems
  • Proprietary AI logic built on a decade of AI experience, designed for quick deployment and accuracy at scale
  • A user-centric design that can be deployed as fully customized applications or integrated into existing systems like SAP Analytics Cloud or Integrated Business Planning.

Empowering finance with AI-powered insights 

Finance teams face enormous pressure to make accurate, data-driven decisions in an environment of increasing complexity and uncertainty. They must analyze vast amounts of data to forecast outcomes, guide strategic planning, and optimize financial operations. 

To be truly effective, these insights need to be accurate at scale and delivered in time for the business to act.

The DataRobot Insight App for Finance bridges the gap between raw data and actionable insights through seamless integration with SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud, unlocking and optimizing critical use cases across the office of finance. 

This means finance teams can integrate AI-driven forecasts directly into their finance operations, enabling teams to swiftly transform disparate and complex data into reliable insights, leading to faster and more confident decision-making. 

By augmenting critical tasks such as revenue forecasting, budget analysis, and cash flow management, teams can accelerate the delivery of impactful AI while reducing operational costs and risk. 

With ready-to-use solutions for use cases like cash flow forecasting, treasury teams can rapidly deploy solutions that enable end users to access higher quality, invoice-level forecasts precisely where they need them, providing deeper insights into cash inflows and outflows for both the short term and long term. 

This ensures finance leaders can start making more accurate operational cash management decisions in a matter of weeks. Once they have one solution in production, they can quickly scale across the department and the organization. 

Optimizing supply chains with AI-driven forecasting 

Supply chain teams face similar pressure to their FP&A counterparts, as they work to use forecasting to minimize disruption, navigate uncertainty, and ensure operational efficiency. Achieving accuracy at scale and across geographies becomes increasingly difficult as the number of products and stores grows, often requiring dozens or even hundreds of forecasts. 

Even more difficult is ensuring predictions arrive in time to take action and remain consistent with other forecasts. 

The Insight App for supply chain from DataRobot addresses core challenges across the supply chain by combining automated model development with streamlined configuration and process governance. With built-in one-click deployment, these solutions can be seamlessly infused into existing planning workflows in IBP or surfaced in SAC dashboards. This accelerates the first step for our customers to incorporate the latest AI technology, and build a more sustainable and resilient supply chain.

How a DataRobot transformed a global brewery’s supply chain

When the COVID-19 pandemic struck, one of the world’s largest breweries encountered a significant challenge. Their hand-coded models for predicting demand across 20+ markets became ineffective, leading to an imbalance in supply. While beer was flying off retail shelves, it sat untouched in bars and restaurants, costing the company $110 million annually.

The traditional hand-coded approach not only lacked accuracy but also required six months to implement for each use case, making it impossible to scale solutions in time to address the crisis. To overcome this, the brewery turned to DataRobot’s AI capabilities to better connect business data and streamline processes.

By leveraging DataRobot, the brewery reduced model deployment time from six months to just two, rapidly scaling the solution across six global markets. In just five weeks, these advanced models generated over $17 million in additional beer sales, transforming their global supply chain and ensuring they could meet demand with precision.

Put business-ready AI into the hands of your users 

The next era of AI will be defined by delivering AI where users work and how they work. Whether you’re a current SAP customer or just beginning your AI journey, the future of AI value lies in solving business problems and delivering those solutions exactly where they’re needed.

SAP and DataRobot have been focused on removing barriers to this process by helping you simplify access to your data and streamline the delivering of AI apps into the SAP products your teams use every day.

Interested to learn more? Check out DataRobot’s launch webinar featuring SAP.

We also recently published our survey that provides an in-depth view of the hurdles that are preventing AI teams from delivering value.

entry.title: best design for using SAP SAC data into a SAP Fiori - CDS flavour
entry.content:
Hello

User case: We need to solve a consumption scenario based on SAP Sac calculated data into SAP S/4 backend

Users will need to consult a field (CeCo) that will be available on SAP SAC models. The initial proposed design is based on the construction of a CDS-OData flavour that connect to SAC, pull the data and show to the backend users. Scope +1500 SAP backend users

Can someone share her/his opinion about this scenario, the best approach, the alternatives and their knowledge?

Can we think in some kind of SDA federation of the data, can we persist the data in an intermediate layer (i,e BW) o whatever?

I will appreciate your help in advanced

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Close Group Tree button is hidden in Crystal report v...
entry.content:
See if using Sessions and Postback resolves the issue:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/1985571

entry.title: Accrual Management for GL Accruals with ACEPOSTINGRUN in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi to @LL

Currently we’re using the transaction ACEPOSTINGRUN in SAP-GUI mode to create accrual jobs for application component ACAC. Now we want to do it in Fiori Launchpad.

 But the Fiori App ID: ACACACT is no longer available as explained in Snote https://me.sap.com/notes/3556044/D. They explain, that we should use now the transaction ACEPOSTINGRUN in SAP-GUI. I don't think SAP will provide any other way, correct?

We found also the Schedule Accruals Jobs IDF3778 which is probably only for purchase orders. First it didn’t run and we fixed by Snote: https://me.sap.com/notes/3319262/E

In this case we had to add entries into table/view APJ_C_SCOPE and now I’m wondering if it is possible to use this also for GL Accruals? Is it possible to create Job templates which can be used is this way for GL Accruals? Does anybody have an experience in this approach.

Thanks in advance

Marco

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori launchpad: Hiding empty spaces and pages
entry.content:
Great feature! 

I noticed that the post is tagged also with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. I’m particularly curious to learn more about the aspects related to this edition. Could you provide some additional insights or point me to relevant resources?

entry.title: Re: Shelf life report
entry.content: mb5m

entry.title: Re: SAP Crystal Reports randomly crashes on .Export call...
entry.content:
Windows 11 has a lot of updated security functions.

Most common is permissions to various resources, c:\windows\temp folder needs full permissions.

Also,  make sure you are closing and disposing after each export.

Using this MS tool add Private Bytes to check the memory usage to see if there is a leak somewhere:

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-hardware/drivers/debugger/using-performance-monitor-to-find-a-user-mode-memory-leak

Note: there usually is in MS dll's, most of them are small so don't fret if you see a lot. MS Memory Manager leaks due to MS not capable of defragging memory on the fly like Linux can. Only way to fix it is to close the app and reboot once a week... or more often.

entry.title: Re: Printing duplex with GraphicLocationFormula
entry.content:
First is to upgrade to the latest SP 37: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

SAP only supports the latest version, they never patch any version, full builds only.

If you still have issues then let me know and we'll look into it more.

My Printer test app is C# but works the same for VB. There are web sites that can convert C# to VB code.

Also, PrintToPrinter uses the info saved in the RPT file. You could try opening the report in CR Designer, Select Print and choose the same printer you are testing with, save the report and test again. But first update the CR runtime on your DEV PC and then distribute the MSI packages to the users PC. Must use the same version, see my blog above for more info on updating your project.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Stories issue: Codes appearing in dime...
entry.content:
Hello,

Actually SAP is right, this happens when you have significant changes in your Query (e.g. your removed some dimensions from the Query), but didn't do any changes in the Designer. The other reason could be, that some changes were done in EC to those objects that you use in your dimension input control.

So first I would check the Query Preview, it works fine and doesn't fail, then edit the dimension input control.

I have build hundreds of the reports for different customers and per my experience, this happens really seldom only in case there some problems with EC or the set-up of the report (but you always can track it by doing Query preview)

entry.title: Re: Charts in Report stories are not getting refreshed wi...
entry.content:
Hi Nagavalli,

I would say that if report was built correctly, then it's not possible. It's always live data. Could it be connected to some filters applied to your charts or effective date of the data or maybe immaturity of the end user (maybe they do something wrong and compare something incorrectly). I've never seen the data got stuck and stay not updated for a while. I would definitely review the set-up of the report and challenge the end users.

Kind regards,

Olga

entry.title: How to Send a Custom HTTP Header in All SAPUI5 OData V4 Calls?
entry.content:
Hi, experts!

I’m looking for a way to send a custom HTTP header in all OData V4 requests from a SAPUI5 application to the backend.

Ideally, I’d like to dynamically bind a property from a JSON model to this custom header. This way, every request (such as a table refresh or any control binding) would automatically include the updated value from the model.

Does anyone have insights or recommendations on how to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Community Member Spotlight: Roberta Fernandes - February 2025 Edition
entry.content: Congrats Roberta! Organizing Inside Track's is a lot of work on top of being a consultant and you've mastered how to make it several times a year in different city's.

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve PDFs from SAP ArchiveLink and embed them into the eDocument XML (SAP DRC)
entry.content:
Hi Michelle,

i need to attach additional PDF's (i.e. Servicereport) to the ZugFerd XML .. Is this possible and please can you let me know where in the CII XML ? You announced a post regarding the enhancement of the CII XML... Did you write this and maybe i am not able to find it ? Thanks so much for you helpful post!

entry.title: SAP BTP MDK - Android - Inquiry About Font Size Handling in SAP MDK
entry.content:
We are developing a mobile application on SAP BTP using only SAP MDK objects. Overall, we have been able to develop everything successfully, except for one issue related to text font size. Specifically, when the font size set on the user's device is too large, one of the text fields displays ellipsis because the text does not fit within the allocated space.

The only solution we have found so far is to ask the user to adjust their device’s font size, as this issue occurs

when the font is set to "XL."

Regarding the MDK object we are using (which is a standard object), there is no built-in property available to modify its font size. As a

result, the system automatically adjusts the text rendering based on the device's settings:

https://help.sap.com/doc/3642933ef2e1478fb1578ef2acba4ae9/Latest/en-US/reference/schemadoc/Styles/TextPaintClass.style.html

 

We understand that, since there is no property available to control this font size, and given that the normal behavior of an Android application is to adjust text sizes according to the user's settings, this behavior is expected. We conducted tests on other applications, and the same issue occurs—when the text does not fit within the space, ellipses are applied, and the text is truncated.

We also try to provide all the css properties directly in the ObjectCell title but it did not work:

Thanks for all of your help !!

@bill_froelich @Jitendra_Kansal

entry.title: Re: Error while starting preview. Details: AggregateError
entry.content:
the correct package name is in lowecase:

 

npm i @ sap/ui5-builder-webide-extension

 

(remove the space after "@", this is an issue of this forum)

entry.title: Re: SAP US Benefits ACA 1095-C PDF form on ESS
entry.content: Good morning,

entry.title: Re: SAP US Benefits ACA 1095-C PDF form on ESS
entry.content: Do we have any updates whether we will have online ACA 1095-C via ESS?

entry.title: Re: Stop Rumours about Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ALD)
entry.content:
Hi Chetan_Pote,

if possible - I would recommend you update your gui. I am using 8.0.

Please have a look at the following note:https://me.sap.com/notes/2187332/E

 

In case of further issues you must open a support ticket, component BC-FES-GUI

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
@antoniobkw @HarveyXu 

 

Thank you, Yes we have currently setup the Display Name to Preferred First Name + Preferred Last Name if those are available.

However we come across scenario where multiple individuals with same First & Last Names, so we would like to display Middle Name as well ( i.e Preferred First Name + Middle Name + Preferred Last Name )

So wanted to know if that's possible?

entry.title: Re: How to remove serial number inconsistencies by doing a physical inventory count
entry.content:
Dear @Matthias_G_ ,

I hope this Knowledge Base Article helps you 2793156 - Storage location entered is WM-relevant | SAP Knowledge Base Article 😊

Best regards,
Nadja

entry.title: Sector Change is possible for a project in Central Business Configuration?
entry.content:
1) What's the possibility if we want to change the sector of an already created evaluation project? Let's say we want to change the sector from public to private? And if we choose to proceed with this, are there going to be any conflict/consequences?

2) Can we delete a project, if not in use? Is there anything that need to be considered for this ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sector Change is possible for a project in Central Bu...
entry.content:
• It's not possible to change the Sector once it's already selected, If you really want to change the sector if deployment is not completed for the project there's option to delete the project and create a new project again.
  • KBA - 3414246 - Delete a project that hasn't been deployed yet - SAP for Me 
  • If deployment is already performed it's not possible to delete the project, Check the KBA for more information - 3381588 - How to delete the Project in Central Business Configuration (CBC) - SAP for Me 
  • Yeah it's possible to delete the project which is not needed or created by mistake, make sure the deployment is not performed for the project which you want to delete.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Foundational SAP Notes for SAP S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn

The content underneath "Main SAP Notes for SAP Fiori on SAP S/4HANA 2023" ends up with "No data" - Q: do you have an idea when it will be accessible ?
BR Jacob

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content: Hi @ranshapira - VSaaS customers will receive the no opt out with the 2025 upgrade, and the universal ILX only experience with the 2026 upgrade.

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hallo @S0025138380 ,

yes that is possible. You need to create a Business Rule that set Display Name to Preferred First Name + Middle Name + Preferred Last Name, if Middle Name is not null.

Best regards

Antonio

entry.title: Do you want to accelerate yiour the journey to procurement excellence?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering Procurement Solutions learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey is designed for you to discover the Procurement Solution area.

Learning objectives
Upon completing this learning journey, you will be able to understand the fundamental aspects of the Procurement solutions and their potential. You will learn about SAP’s cloud strategy, the integrated portfolio, and how it connects to end-to-end business processes and industries. 

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA DB Server Installation on SUSE Linux
entry.content:
Hi,

Database server should be installed SUSE Linux and application components like SAP B1 client, Data Transfer workbench should be installed in Windows server.

Thank you.

Nagarajan

entry.title: Re: Triggering SAP Build Process Automation Processes from SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) A
entry.content:
Hi @kun_wu ,

sorry for my delayed response. Glad, that you got it working and thanks for the feedback. It might help other users with the same issue in the future 🙂

 

Cheers, Alexander

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve PDFs from SAP ArchiveLink and embed them into the eDocument XML (SAP DRC)
entry.content: Hi @Steglich, you can use the same code since the CII document is generated based on the UBL document.

entry.title: Re: Good afternoon dear, I have a question, I always run the MRP from MD04 entering with a selection
entry.content: Dear; I exactly need the sales order to be excluded from the MRP planning but continue to do the stock verification as the CP distribution type does, the detail is that with the CN distribution type it does not perform the verification and it needs to be done even excluding the order from the planning

entry.title: Re: Error in downloading report -Purchase Register (Item+...
entry.content:
Hello,

There are a few things you can verify:

1 - Check if you have filter applied to the sap grid:

That would explain missing data.

2 - Check if there are special characters in text fields in any column, like < $ > etc. That would explain the problem in your screenshot.

3 - Check if the language of the server where you are running SBO and the machine where you are pasting the data in excel are is the same. It could be some encoding related problem.

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: Good afternoon dear, I have a question, I always run...
entry.content: Dear; I exactly need the sales order to be excluded from the MRP planning but continue to do the stock verification as the CP distribution type does, the detail is that with the CN distribution type it does not perform the verification and it needs to be done even excluding the order from the planning

entry.title: Re: Customizing Subject Line for Success/Failure RSP Back...
entry.content:
Hi,

We can't change subject line that is provided by SAP B1.

Thank you.

Nagarajan

entry.title: How can I export the Artikelbeschreibung from the various languages fields for all Artikelnr?
entry.content: How can I export the Artikelbeschreibung from the various languages fields for all Artikelnr? This field is not stored together with the Artikel. What database table can I export from?

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP Platform 1909, Developer Edition: See New Blog Post
entry.content:
Hi to all, Hope you all are doing seriously very Good.

Just follow only one approach which will resolve all your issues and at least you will be:-

Able to startup without error and you will be habituated to see "Have FUN".

1. I have increased memory parameter in the ( .wslconfig ) :-

[wsl2]
memory=30GB
localhostForwarding=true

2. Tried to increase the SAP Parameters from the Docker PowerShell Command Prompt:

docker run -d --sysctl kernel.shmmax=21474836480 --sysctl kernel.shmmni=32768 --sysctl kernel.shmall=5242880 --sysctl kernel.msgmni=1024 --sysctl kernel.sem="1250 256000 100 8192" --ulimit nofile=1048576:1048576 --name a4h_2022_20240421 -it sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01

3. Then after restart I tried to login into the Abap Instance and Scheduled SGEN then I have gone into SICF to activate SAPGui Web Login And Fiori activation etc.

4. Apply the Active license from ( https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap )

NOTE: Here you can use your [ xxxxvcvcv@gmail.com ] Email_id as well, No worries.

5. Restart and Enjoy.

NOTE: Here I am unable to use S/4 Hana 2.0 Studio and Eclipse Application for Hana Developer tasks and testing etc. I am really extremely sorry to fail to get the answers for TWO simple questions mentioned below:-

A) How to expose the Hana Admin Port expected 32015 to outside the Docker Container environment ?

B) What is the ( abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01 ) S/4 Hana DB SYSTEM user password

Thanks & Regards

Kushal Sambhunath Banerjee

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Hello Sanket,

 Thanks for showing interest. We shall get back to you if there are any dropouts.

Thanks & Regards

Sheena.

entry.title: Re: he database structure has been modified. In order to...
entry.content:
Hi,

The above message will appear whenever the user creates a new user defined fields. Please check any add-on is running or some one created the new UDF.

Thank you.

Nagarajan

entry.title: Re: SYSTEM VARIABLES IN PLD
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer below threads,

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/problem-in-pld/qaq-p/9664286

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/pld-editing/qaq-p/10032013

Thank you.

Nagarajan

entry.title: Best DMS on-premise backend for SAP HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone suggest a suitable on-premise CMIS compliant backend server for S4HC?

We tested the on-premise MS Sharepoint, but we were not able to connect the two systems.

Our management requirement is that it should be on-premise at leas the document storage backend.

Thank you in advanced!

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve PDFs from SAP ArchiveLink and embed them into the eDocument XML (SAP DRC)
entry.content: HI, thanks for replying so quick. Does that mean i can attach this files in Method SET_OUTPUT_DATA in structure EDO_UBL_STANDARD_BUSINESS_DOC(2/5) and ZUGFeRD XML will be generated out of this ? Meaning the addition PDF's are contained in the XML which itself is included in the ZUGFeRD Invoice PDF ?

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
@antoniobkw 

That's awesome, you made by day 🙂.when you get a chance could you please share the instructions/screen shot on where/how to setup the business rule , so that I can pass it along to the platform team internally for necessary changes.

entry.title: Re: Failed to subscribe Build Apps in BTP Trial
entry.content: I am facing the same issue. I use "Build an App with SAP Build with trial account" in my class. It worked well last week, and students began to report the errors yesterday (2/12/2025) with the "Subscribing SaaS application Failed" error or " SAP Build Access Denied" message.

entry.title: NZ Payroll User Group Meeting - Auckland, New Zealand
entry.content:
Would you like to connect with other payroll experts and keep up to date with the newest trends in the payroll industry? The Annual NZ Payroll User Group Meeting in Auckland is set to be both informative and interactive, offering essential updates and networking opportunities that are too good to pass up!

Agenda at a glance:
SAP Update – SAP New Zealand
Payroll Continuous Improvements – EPI-USE
Navigating Payroll Compliance – EPI-USE Labs

Speaker:
Katherine Truman, Localization Product Manager, SAP Globalization

For more information and details about the agenda, please visit here.

REGISTRATION LINK

Can't make it to Auckland? Join us for another event:
- Annual NZ Payroll User Group Meeting in Wellington, 20 February, 2:00 - 5:00 pm. Te Wharewaka, 2 Taranaki Street, Wellington) Link
- Virtual: 25 February, 4:00 - 7:00 pm Link

If you want to get more information about the New Zealand Payroll topics provided by SAP experts, join the New Zealand Payroll - Human Capital Management Localization Work Zone group.

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps
entry.content: same here ...

entry.title: Re: Unkown numbers in query's
entry.content:
Hi,

The above number are coming the document. For example, please refer attached image.

entry.title: 請問有API可以讓外部系統查詢[自動科目決定]嗎?
entry.content:
有提供標準API可以讓外部系統查詢[自動科目決定]的資料嗎?

或是，自動科目決定有CDS View可以運用嗎?

entry.title: Recreation of deleted BTP subaccount possible?
entry.content:
Hello, I just would like to know if it is possible to restore a (potentially by mistake) deleted subaccount as a whole?
I mean restore everything from cf spaces to destination configuration, trust and user management, service instances and so on.
Which methods of restoring subaccounts does SAP provide for admins?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Recreation of deleted BTP subaccount possible?
entry.content:
Currently there is no opportunity to restore the subaccount after deletion. Some of the service providers has backups, however for this cases should be opened for Service specific component.

See further details in KBA: 3165828 - BTP CF Subaccount is accidentally deleted: What are next steps

entry.title: 3 Reasons to Register for the SAP Business Data Cloud Primer in 30 Minutes Webinar
entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced business environment, leaders need real-time insights to drive better decisions and stay competitive. However, fragmented data, disconnected systems, and manual reporting make it difficult to get a clear, actionable view of your business.

If you’re looking to unlock the full potential of your data, mark your calendars for SAP’s upcoming webinar, SAP Business Data Cloud Primer in 30 Minutes. Join us for an introduction to SAP Business Data Cloud, where you’ll discover how it unifies and governs all SAP data and seamlessly connects with third-party data, providing a trusted and harmonized data foundation that gives you full business context to make more impactful decisions across all lines of business.  

Here are the top three reasons to register.

1. Discover how SAP Business Data Cloud Unleashes Transformative Insights Across Lines of Business

In this webinar, you’ll gain a clear understanding of how SAP Business Data Cloud helps organizations harmonize data from SAP and non-SAP systems, delivering a single source of truth for decision-making. Learn how SAP Business Data Cloud connects data across finance, HR, supply chain, and more, to drive smarter insights and automation while maintaining business context.

2. Explore Real-World Use Cases for SAP Business Data Cloud

Hear how your business can leverage SAP Business Data Cloud to eliminate data silos, improve analytics, and enable AI-driven decision-making. Gain insights into how organizations can successfully unify their data landscapes to bridge the gap between IT and business leaders, increase efficiency, enhance operational visibility, and drive measurable business outcomes.

3. See SAP Business Data Cloud in Action

Experience a product demo showcasing SAP Business Data Cloud’s capabilities, including prebuilt analytical apps and real-time data products. See firsthand how it simplifies complex data challenges, enhances governance, and enables seamless AI-driven insights across your organization.

Secure Your Spot Today

Don’t miss this opportunity to explore how SAP Business Data Cloud can revolutionize the way your organization leverages data. Join us for the SAP Business Data Cloud Primer in 30 Minutes webinar on March 13. to gain the knowledge and tools needed to accelerate your data-driven transformation.

entry.title: Re: getting errors user not allowed to backup encrypted d...
entry.content: The message - User 28 not allowed in database 'db1' - only the owner of this database can access it. - is generated when a database has been set to dbo use only and a non-dbo user attempts to access said database.

entry.title: Re: Characteristics CDS View ：I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate
entry.content: Hi Amith, is there a cds view published for cloud development to get characteristic from PO or SO documents, same as I_ClfnObjectCharcValue for example that gets it from master data (Products, Suppliers, etc...) ?

entry.title: Re: How Sequence of Stages are determined in the Freight Order
entry.content:
Hello, 

Did you find the answer to this? Also, do ou know how FO type is determined in this case?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: table join MARA , AUSP , MAKT, MARD
entry.content:
This thread is more than 15 years old, why are you replying to it?! Also, it has already been pointed out that MARA-MATNR = AUSP-OBJEK will not work.
To use your words: please verify your reply next time to see if it is really necessary to reply to an old thread
